mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_announcement_send ( id, annt_id, user_id, read_flag, read_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{anntId}, #{userId}, COALESCE(#{readFlag}, 0), #{readTime}, COALESCE(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) ON CONFLICT (annt_id, user_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO sys_announcement_send (id, annt_id, user_id, read_flag, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.anntId}, #{item.userId}, COALESCE(#{item.readFlag}, 0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON CONFLICT (annt_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_announcement_send WHERE annt_id = #{anntId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_announcement_send SET read_flag = 1, read_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND annt_id IN
#{anntId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_announcement_send WHERE annt_id = #{anntId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_announcement a INNER JOIN sys_announcement_send s ON a.id = s.annt_id AND s.user_id = #{userId} WHERE a.send_status = 1 AND (a.start_time IS NULL OR a.start_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (a.end_time IS NULL OR a.end_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND s.read_flag = 0
